where: I.html (and fr/en I.json), §5.3, proof of Th. 5.3.1 — 'défini dans 5.2'
evidence: origExp1.pdf p.23-24 prints 'défini dans 5.2', but printed Exp I §5 has only headings 5.1, Prop 5.2.1, Lemme 5.2.2, 5.3 — no '5.2.' heading exists (the µ_F/E(F) construction sits in unnumbered prose before Prop 5.2.1). Stale printed reference: text kept, href re-pointed to enclosing §5 anchor #I.5.

where: III.html (and fr/en III.json), §0, paragraph 'Soit X un S-foncteur. Définissons un foncteur X^+ …'
before: Soit X un S-foncteur. Définissons un foncteur
after: Soit X un S-foncteur. Définissons un foncteur
evidence: Exp9-8nov09.pdf p.(N.D.E. 39 passage) prints '(cf. III 0.1.2)' — the re-edition editors' numbering for the X^+ = prod_{S_J/S} X_J / p_X construction, which in origExp3.pdf is unnumbered prose between Définition 0.1 and Proposition 0.2. Added id III.0.1.2 to that paragraph; IX.html citation left unchanged.

where: XII.html (and fr/en XII.json), §4 (proof after 4.8, line w/ Centr_G(T)) — '(VIII 6.6)'
evidence: Expo12.pdf p.8 prints '(VIII 6.6)'; Exp8-8nov09.pdf N.D.E. (29): 'On a conservé la numérotation de l'original : il n'y a pas de 6.6.' Stale printed reference (intended result is the closedness of centralizers, cf. VIII 6.5/6.7 area): text kept, href re-pointed to #VIII.6.

where: XII.html (and fr/en XII.json), proof of Cor. 4.9 — 'ce qui signifie (II 4.5.1)'
evidence: Expo12.pdf p.18 prints 'ce qui signifie (II 4.5.) que pour t ∈ t…' — citation is II 4.5 (Prop. 4.5 of Exp II exists, id II.4.5); '4.5.1' was a mis-restoration. Visible text and href corrected in all three files.

where: XII.html (and fr/en XII.json), §8 area — 'au début de la démonstration de IX 3.7'
evidence: Expo12.pdf p.20 prints 'IX 3.7'; Exp9-8nov09.pdf N.D.E. (10): 'On a conservé la numérotation de l'original : il n'y a pas de n° 3.7.' Stale printed reference — from context (projective limit T of T_n with noetherian local rings; following sentence offers 'loc. cit., ou XI 3.11') the intended target is almost certainly XI 3.7, whose proof begins with exactly that noetherian-local-rings argument. Per policy, text kept as printed and href re-pointed to #IX.3.

Expo13.pdf p.2 prints 'VI_B .11.18' (re-edition numbering pointing at the published new edition of VI_B); origExp6B.pdf §11 — the source of our VIB transcription — ends at Théorème 11.17 with no 11.18 and no unnumbered item corresponding to it. Text kept, href re-pointed to #VIB.11.
